ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-24-2024 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court orders the case dismissed pursuant to Government Code 68608(b). The court finds no good cause or substantial justification for failure to comply with the previous court orders. A less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Judge: Samuel K. Feng; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Proceedings not reported. (610)

MOTION TO DISMISS
Off Calendar Oct-27-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES (via Zoom):

Jeremy E. Shulman; Anglin Flewelling & Rasmussen LLP; 626-535-1900; appearing on behalf of defendant Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.
Gerard Karlen; 203-520-9114; plaintiff in pro per, appearing on their own behalf.

Plaintiff contests the court's tentative ruling. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, NA'S MOTION TO DISMISS is GRANTED, this action is stayed for Plaintiff to re-file in Connecticut.

Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO DISMISS
Off Calendar Sep-23-2021 Continued To Oct-27-21 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Gerard Karlen; plaintiff in pro per; appearing via Zoom on their own behalf.

No other appearances.

Discussed. Plaintiff requests a continuance. The court rules as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO DISMISS is continued to October 27, 2021.

Notice of new hearing date shall be provided by the court. Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)
